data.title: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. Announces First Day of Trading of Bonds at Euronext Oslo Børs
data.description: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. revealed that their senior unsecured bond issue worth USD 300,000,000 has been approved for listing on Euronext Oslo Børs. This forms a part of a larger framework totaling USD 500,000,000. The bonds, identified by the ISIN NO0013685115, will begin trading on Euronext Oslo Børs today under the ticker symbol "NMM". Navios Partners, a prominent international owner and operator of dry cargo and tanker vessels, made this announcement from Piraeus, Greece on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Claude Code boosts MacCoss Lab's dev process, managing 700k-line codebase, speeding up work, cutting tech debt.
data.description: The MacCoss Lab experienced a significant transformation in its handling of a massive 700,000-line legacy codebase by ingeniously utilizing the Claude Code. This resulted in a notable boost in development speed and a reduction in technical debt for the lab.

data.title: New multimodal AI model, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, now integrated into Together AI for efficient reasoning across video, audio & text.
data.description: Together AI has recently incorporated the NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, a versatile multimodal AI model, into their platform. This integration provides developers with highly efficient and scalable reasoning capabilities across various media formats including video, audio, and text.

data.title: April 2026: NVIDIA unveils Nemotron 3 Nano Omni with 9x AI efficiency boost combining vision, audio, and language.
data.description: In April 2026, NVIDIA released the Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, a groundbreaking model that combines vision, audio, and language capabilities into one. This innovation provides AI agents with a remarkable 9x increase in throughput, marking a significant advancement in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, enhancing AI efficiency by 9x. Launching on April 28, 2026.
data.description: NVIDIA is set to release the Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, a cutting-edge technology that combines vision, audio, and language capabilities for AI systems. This advancement is expected to deliver remarkable efficiency gains, with up to a 9x improvement. The Nemotron 3 Nano Omni will be officially launched on April 28, 2026.

data.title: OpenAI increases Codex efficiency by 40% using WebSockets in Responses API, hitting 1,000 TPS with GPT-5.3. Learn more.
data.description: The Recent Update of OpenAI's Responses API, incorporating WebSockets, has led to a remarkable 40% increase in agentic workflow speeds. This enhancement has allowed GPT-5.3 to achieve a notable milestone of processing 1,000 transactions per second (TPS). This significant advancement in AI technology showcases how OpenAI's innovative approach has revolutionized the efficiency and capabilities of their systems. To learn more about the details of this transformation, continue reading.

data.title: Statkraft signs long-term power contracts with Hydro
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on April 29, 2026, Hydro Energi AS and Statkraft sealed two extended power purchase agreements (PPA) for a combined annual delivery of 0.9 TWh in 2029 and 2030, increasing to 1.3 TWh per year from 2031 to 2038.

data.title: Quinbrook Advances UK’s Largest Synchronous Condenser Portfolio with £156M Financing and Final Scottish Project Launch
data.description: London-based investment manager Quinbrook has reached two important milestones in its synchronous condenser portfolio. It secured a £156 million debt financing package for the synchronous condensers in its Severn portfolio and launched operations at the Neilston synchronous condenser project in West Central Scotland. These developments mark significant progress for the company in supporting the energy transition. The UK's growing dependence on power generation is driving investments in infrastructure like synchronous condensers.

data.title: Hepsor AS consolidated unaudited interim report for Q1 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Hepsor experienced a surge in both sales and construction efforts. The Group saw a remarkable uptick in apartment construction and sales activity. Throughout the quarter, Hepsor finalized a total of 72 initial home sales. Of these, 54 were homes in progress while 18 were in finished buildings. The Group's overall assets saw a substantial rise to 97 million euros by the quarter's end, marking a 6% increase from the start of the reporting year. By the quarter's closure, Hepsor had 428 new homes under construction, a significant jump from the 152 homes being built by March 31, 2025. Moving forward, Hepsor anticipates continued asset growth. The upcoming quarters will include commencing construction on 207 new homes and 9,623 square meters of new commercial spaces.

data.title: Fiverr Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Fiverr International Ltd. (NYSE: FVRR) announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, known for revolutionizing collaborative work globally, shared its additional operating results and management insights in a shareholder letter available on its investor relations website at investors.fiverr.com. This update was made public on April 29, 2026, showcasing the company's performance in the current quarter.
